subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath reinforced with hosts from the Supreme Concourse! Thy noble letter and its delicate themes were as soul and fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ایدک الله بجنود من الملا الاعلی دستخط شریف و مضامین لطیف روح و ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
